titles.en: Avoid unnecessary concerns about unlikely events
Avoid unnecessary concerns about unlikely events

segments: ٣٦٤. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): لَا تَسْأَلْ عَمَّا لَا يَكُونُ، فَفِي الَّذِي قَدْ كَانَ لَكَ شُغُلٌ.
arabic.text: ٣٦٤. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): لَا تَسْأَلْ عَمَّا لَا يَكُونُ، فَفِي الَّذِي قَدْ كَانَ لَكَ شُغُلٌ.

segments: 364. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: Do not ask about things which may not happen because you have enough to worry about with what happens.
en.sayed-ali-raza.text: 364. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: Do not ask about things which may not happen because you have enough to worry about with what happens.
